name: Cheese Dreams: New Moon
author: Poki
description: Cheese Dreams: New Moon is a platformer game where you play as a bouncing moon kidnapped by mischievous space mice. Your goal is to navigate through tricky levels and find the exit to escape their clutches. You'll have to master the moon's bouncy physics to avoid traps, outsmart obstacles, and bounce your way to freedom. Each level brings new challenges that will test your timing and skill. Do you have what it takes to break free in Cheese Dreams: New Moon? How to play Cheese Dreams: New Moon? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move around! Who created Cheese Dreams: New Moon? Cheese Dreams: New Moon was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bump Battle Royale , Bad Ice-Cream and Double Edged ! How can I play Cheese Dreams: New Moon for free? You can play Cheese Dreams: New Moon for free on Poki. Can I play Cheese Dreams: New Moon on mobile devices and desktop? Cheese Dreams: New Moon can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
